'''modhathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:shackless|shackless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:shackless|shackless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| modhathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhathithi|modhathithi]] || [[word:modhathiji|modhathiji]] || [[word:modhathishi|modhathishi]] || [[word:modhathiki|modhathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhathuthuthu|modhathuthuthu]] || [[word:modhathujuju|modhathujuju]] || [[word:modhathushushu|modhathushushu]] || [[word:modhathukuku|modhathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhathuthu|modhathuthu]] || [[word:modhathuju|modhathuju]] || [[word:modhathushu|modhathushu]] || [[word:modhathuku|modhathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhathufthuf|modhathufthuf]] || [[word:modhathufjuf|modhathufjuf]] || [[word:modhathufshuf|modhathufshuf]] || [[word:modhathufkuf|modhathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhathethe|modhathethe]] || [[word:modhatheje|modhatheje]] || [[word:modhatheshe|modhatheshe]] || [[word:modhatheke|modhatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhathothotho|modhathothotho]] || [[word:modhathojojo|modhathojojo]] || [[word:modhathoshosho|modhathoshosho]] || [[word:modhathokoko|modhathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhathotho|modhathotho]] || [[word:modhathojo|modhathojo]] || [[word:modhathosho|modhathosho]] || [[word:modhathoko|modhathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhathofthof|modhathofthof]] || [[word:modhathofjof|modhathofjof]] || [[word:modhathofshof|modhathofshof]] || [[word:modhathofkof|modhathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfthĂŻf|modhathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfjĂŻf|modhathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfshĂŻf|modhathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfkĂŻf|modhathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|modhathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|modhathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|modhathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|modhathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfthĂŻf|modhathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfjĂŻf|modhathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfshĂŻf|modhathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfkĂŻf|modhathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfthĂŻf|modhathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfjĂŻf|modhathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfshĂŻf|modhathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:modhathĂŻfkĂŻf|modhathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhathĂŠthĂŠ|modhathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:modhathĂŠjĂŠ|modhathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:modhathĂŠshĂŠ|modhathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:modhathĂŠkĂŠ|modhathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhathathatha|modhathathatha]] || [[word:modhathajaja|modhathajaja]] || [[word:modhathashasha|modhathashasha]] || [[word:modhathakaka|modhathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhathatha|modhathatha]] || [[word:modhathaja|modhathaja]] || [[word:modhathasha|modhathasha]] || [[word:modhathaka|modhathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhathafthaf|modhathafthaf]] || [[word:modhathafjaf|modhathafjaf]] || [[word:modhathafshaf|modhathafshaf]] || [[word:modhathafkaf|modhathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:modhathasha|modhathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhathshĂ«sha|modhathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhathrosha|modhathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhathmusha|modhathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhathyasha|modhathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhathnkshĂ«sha|gomodhathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhathnkrosha|gomodhathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhathnkmusha|gomodhathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhathnkyasha|gomodhathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:modhadhathasha|modhadhathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhadhathshĂ«sha|modhadhathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhadhathrosha|modhadhathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhadhathmusha|modhadhathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhadhathyasha|modhadhathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhadhathnkshĂ«sha|gomodhadhathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhadhathnkrosha|gomodhadhathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhadhathnkmusha|gomodhadhathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhadhathnkyasha|gomodhadhathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:medhĂŠthasha|medhĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:medhĂŠthshĂ«sha|medhĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:medhĂŠthrosha|medhĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:medhĂŠthmusha|medhĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:medhĂŠthyasha|medhĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomedhĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|gomedhĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomedhĂŠthnkrosha|gomedhĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomedhĂŠthnkmusha|gomedhĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomedhĂŠthnkyasha|gomedhĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:modhfathasha|modhfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhfathshĂ«sha|modhfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhfathrosha|modhfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhfathmusha|modhfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhfathyasha|modhfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhfathnkshĂ«sha|gomodhfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhfathnkrosha|gomodhfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhfathnkmusha|gomodhfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhfathnkyasha|gomodhfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
